Common questions

Quick answers to help you get started

Create an account and click the post button on the home page. Fill in your details about the space, add photos, set your price, and publish.

Yes. Once you find a listing that interests you, use the messaging feature to contact the poster directly.

You can delete your post at any time from your account.

We take privacy seriously. Your personal details are only shared when you choose to message someone.

Posting and searching are completely free.

Get started finding your match

Join others who've found their place through ColocDZ Platform. You can post, message and even search for matches, just with one easy fast click.

Quiet Authority in Housing. We curate high-impact living spaces for a mission-driven generation.
